history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man, seen from behind, stands in a dimly lit billiards room, holding a pool cue. He is wearing a black t-shirt with red text on the back that reads "Certified Your Bo" in a stylized font, and loose-fitting white pants. He is positioned to the right of a blue billiards table, with several balls scattered across its surface. The table itself is grey with a "XINGJUE" logo visible on its side. The room's decor features vertical wood-paneled walls with horizontal LED strip lighting that casts a warm glow. Above the table, a modern, rectangular light fixture with multiple panels illuminates the playing area. The overall mood is relaxed and focused, suggesting a casual game of pool. The color palette is dominated by the deep blue of the table, the dark tones of the walls and ceiling, the white of the man's pants, and the warm orange and white light. The image has a slightly grainy, low-light aesthetic.
